falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if at least 2 of 3 metrics pass: annual CPIH rises by more than 1pp from 2016 to 2017, the CPI level rises by more than 3.5 percent from 2016Q2 to 2017Q4, and CPI-deflated weekly earnings fall over the same window. REFUTED if 1 or fewer pass.

metrics.description: CPIH annual inflation rose after the referendum.
Headline CPI index rose over the 18-month post-vote window.
CPI-deflated weekly earnings fell over the same window.
